title: Phase 19 – Contract Sync & Evidence Regeneration (Phase 2B)

integration_points.purpose: Regenerate ephemeral evidence and align contract task statuses
integration_points.notes: ESM module exporting syncContract + CLI entrypoint; supports optional --root override

integration_points.purpose: Add npm run state:sync command alongside existing state utilities
Expose sync_status metadata derived from contract mtime and pending tasks
integration_points.snippet: snapshot.sync_status = { last_sync: contractStat?.mtime.toISOString() ?? null, contract_stale: pendingTasks.length > 0, stale_tasks: pendingTasks.map(t => t.id) };

integration_points.purpose: Vitest coverage for sync logic (happy path + idempotency)
integration_points.notes: Creates tmp workspace, spies on execSync, validates statuses

justification: Resolves contract drift by regenerating evidence and recording sync metadata for the autonomous workflow
rollback: Remove sync script + npm command, delete tests, drop snapshot sync_status field
